title: To Jessica, Gone Back To The City
content:
آ آ آ آ Sence fair Jessica hez left us
آ آ آ آ Seems ez ef she hed bereft us,
آ آ آ آ When she went, oï؟½ half oï؟½ livinï؟½;
آ آ آ آ Fer we never knowed sheï؟½d driven
آ آ آ آ Into us so much content,
آ آ آ آ Till fair Jessica hed went.
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ (Knowed a feller once thet cried
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ When his yaller dog hed died.)

آ آ آ آ We hainï؟½t near ez bright anï؟½ chirky,
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ the sun shines blue anï؟½ murky,
آ آ آ آ Kind oï؟½ sadly anï؟½ dishearted,
آ آ آ آ Like ets sperret bed departed;
آ آ آ آ Just ez ef ets joy bed ceased
آ آ آ آ Sence fair Jessica ï؟½s gone East.
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ (Not but what ets always sober
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Sort oï؟½ weather in October.)

آ آ آ آ Then the posies, too, seems human,
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ hez all quit oï؟½ their bloominï؟½;
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ the trees they show a pallor
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ hey turned a heart-sick yaller,
آ آ آ آ Sayinï؟½, ï؟½No use livinï؟½ on
آ آ آ آ Ef fair Jessica hez gone.ï؟½
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ (Folks thet knows sez this ez all
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Very common in the fall.)

آ آ آ آ Truth ez, Iï؟½m a-feelinï؟½ sadly;
آ آ آ آ Things ez goinï؟½ kind oï؟½ badly
آ آ آ آ Round my heart anï؟½ other vitals
آ آ آ آ (Brings on poetry recitals
آ آ آ آ Oï؟½ my woes ï؟½most evï؟½ry day)
آ آ آ آ Sence fair Jessicaï؟½s away.
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ (Kind oï؟½ think thet I will haf ter
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Smoke a leetle less hereafter.)

آ آ آ آ But, with fun aside, you know,
آ آ آ آ Weï؟½re blamed sorry she must go;
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ we hope sheï؟½ll think, maybe,
آ آ آ آ ï؟½Z well oï؟½ us ez we oï؟½ she.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ellis Parker Butler delivers a powerful performance in "To Jessica, Gone Back To The City"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
